VoiceFeatures.description:
22 acoustic features extracted from a voice recording.

Field aliases match the UCI dataset column names exactly.
Ranges are dataset min/max ± 20 % (rounded), validated server-side.
VoiceFeatures.title: VoiceFeatures

schema.title: Response List Audit Log Api V1 Admin Audit Log Get
Response List Feedback Api V1 Admin Feedback Get
Response Me Api V1 Admin Me Get
Response List Predictions Api V1 Admin Predictions Get

get.description: 22x22 Pearson correlation matrix on the bundled dataset.
Total rows, per-class counts, and class balance (% Parkinson's).

Histogram + per-class boxplot stats for one feature.

`name` must be one of the canonical UCI column names (e.g. `MDVP:Fo(Hz)`).
PCA scatter of the dataset, points labeled by class.

post.description: Predict Parkinson's directly from an audio file with strict validation.
Validate credentials, return a JWT, and set an HttpOnly cookie.

schema.title: Response Logout Api V1 Auth Logout Post

post.description: Accept a CSV upload and queue a batch prediction job.

Takes the extracted acoustic features and the ensemble prediction probability,
and returns a streaming Server-Sent Events (SSE) response containing a 
plain-English explanation generated by the LLM.

Persist user feedback against a known prediction.

The `prediction_id` must reference an existing row — unknown ids return 404
instead of being silently accepted.

get.description: Basic health check for load balancers.

schema.title: Response Healthz Api V1 Healthz Get
